script.hook: You can't trade full-time if your account is under £10k.
script.mechanism: FXIFY lets you trade a funded account up to $200K after passing a two-phase evaluation. You hit a 10% profit target in phase one, 5% in phase two, with an 8% max drawdown. Pass and you keep 80% of profits — no personal capital at risk during the challenge itself.
script.cta: Hit the link in my bio to start your FXIFY challenge. Trading involves risk, and this is an evaluation.

full_script_text: You can't trade full-time if your account is under £10k. FXIFY lets you trade a funded account up to $200K after passing a two-phase evaluation. You hit a 10% profit target in phase one, 5% in phase two, with an 8% max drawdown. Pass and you keep 80% of profits — no personal capital at risk during the challenge itself. Hit the link in my bio to start your FXIFY challenge. Trading involves risk, and this is an evaluation.

visual_direction.kling_prompt: multiple trading screens showing financial charts, dark professional trading environment, cold blue monitor glow, no faces, 9:16 vertical cinematic, documentary realism
visual_direction.negative_prompt: faces, lifestyle, warm colours, celebration, fake wealth, luxury
